A '''female''' was a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] had a pet [[saw-toothed grank]].

==Behind the scenes==
The appearance of this species is one that appeared in the preliminary design stage for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. Members of this species were designed as slaves and servants for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] as seen in ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace]]''.
